details.fellowshipSong: When We All Get to Heaven #514

list: Women on Mission will meet tomorrow, May 11 at 6:00 PM to lead decorating for VBS. Judy Rogers is in charge and encourages everyone to come join in.
May 13: This Wednesday is the first Beech Creek Round Up of the year at the Samples’ ranch from 6:00-8:00 PM.

May 17: Next week is Senior Sunday. Send your senior’s pictures for a slideshow to Ryan by email by tomorrow evening. Additionally, Women on Mission will be recognizing our kids that are transitioning from pre-school, kindergarten, 6th grade, 8th grade and graduating college.

Our 2026 VBS, Emerald Crossing, is May 31-June 3 from 6:00-8:00 PM nightly. Please sign up to help on the sheets in the foyer. If you ordered a VBS tee, those are $15 for XL and smaller, $17 for XXL and larger. Please give your payment to Ryan ASAP.
